summary: Backend refactoring validation complete. All 22 backend API tests passed. All 3 frontend login flows verified (Operator, Management, Plan). The monolithic server.py was successfully split into 23 modular files without breaking any functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: All routes properly imported and registered in server.py
Database connection properly centralized in database.py
Auth helpers properly centralized in auth.py
WebSocket managers properly centralized in websocket_manager.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring validated. All endpoints working correctly after splitting monolithic server.py into modular files: database.py, auth.py, models.py, websocket_manager.py, and routes/ directory with 16 route modules. Key endpoints tested: /api/health, /api/, /api/machines, /api/jobs, /api/management/login, /api/users/login (operator/plan/depo), /api/dashboard/live, /api/analytics/weekly, /api/audit-logs, /api/paints, /api/defects, /api/shifts/current, /api/vehicles, /api/drivers, /api/shipments, /api/pallets. All authentication flows working with JWT tokens. Protected endpoints correctly require auth. Frontend login pages all functional.
